{"society_power": 8.5, "state_power": 7.5, "society_change": 0.5, "state_change": -0.5, "key_event": "Giscardian liberalizing reforms and post-1968 civic mobilization", "reasoning": "De Gaulle's referendum defeat, new social movements (feminism, environmentalism), the united left, and Giscardian liberalization (abortion, voting age, divorce, ORTF reform) strengthened an already-dense civil society, while the 1973 oil shock and rising unemployment modestly eroded the dirigiste state's economic steering capacity and legitimacy\u2014adjustments within a mature Shackled Leviathan."}
